title: Guide
subtitle: Quick guide for using TwizzTools features.

cutter.title: Carousel Cutter Guide
cutter.subtitle: Use a 1350px tall canvas. Each slide uses 1080px width, then image is cut per box for carousel.

steps.title: Pick a tool
steps.description: Choose a tool from the main navigation based on what you want to create.

steps.title: Set inputs
steps.description: Fill in the required fields and adjust settings before generating results.

steps.title: Export results
steps.description: Copy, download, or save generated output when it matches your needs.
